name: weaviate
explanation: Weaviate exposes Prometheus-formatted metrics on a fixed `/metrics` path; the upstream-documented default port is 2112 (configurable via the `PROMETHEUS_MONITORING_PORT` env var). The check class is `WeaviateCheck(OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2, ConfigMixin)` and the spec uses `template: instances/openmetrics` with `openmetrics_endpoint` overridden as required. The optional `weaviate_api_endpoint` (default `http://localhost:8080`) adds a small set of REST API metrics (`/v1/meta`, `/v1/nodes`, `/v1/.well-known/live`) but the check skips that block when the field is unset, so the OpenMetrics endpoint is the only mandatory probe. This is a textbook 'OpenMetrics on a known port' case — pattern A.
notes: No on-disk auto_conf.yaml ships with the integration, but the Prometheus port and path are stable enough for openmetrics-port-scan to handle. The optional REST API endpoint is best-effort and can be skipped during discovery.
